title: limonium minutum subsp. revolutum
intro: Limonium minutum subsp. revolutum, also known as the dwarf sea lavender, is a plant species belonging to the family Plumbaginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Limonium minutum subsp. revolutum include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as having a calming effect on the nervous system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems.
